ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to the dataset */,
  "instances" INTEGER /* Number of instances in the dataset */,
  "features" INTEGER /* Number of features in the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON, Parquet) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., internal, external, public) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was uploaded */,
  "uploader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the dataset */,
  "is_encrypted" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the dataset is encrypted */,
  "size_in_bytes" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for the dataset for easier search and categorization */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last date the dataset was modified */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prediction_tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset assigned to the task */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the task was created */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., pending, running, completed) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the task started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the task ended */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Additional performance metrics (e.g., precision, recall) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments on the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prediction_tasks_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prediction_tasks_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, data scientist, researcher) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for programmatic access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the access request */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the access was successful */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments on the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_access_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task being evaluated */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model on the task */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model on the task */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model on the task */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model on the task */,
  "roc_auc" REAL /* ROC AUC score of the model on the task */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments on the performance entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_performance_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES prediction_tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used by the model (e.g., logistic regression, random forest) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was created */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the model is public or private */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last date the model was modified */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "model_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model performance entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task being evaluated */,
  "performance" REAL /* Performance of the model on the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES prediction_tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task being assigned */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being assigned */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the assignment was made */,
  "assigned_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the dataset to the task */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments on the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_assignments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES prediction_tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_assignments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_assignments_assigned_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being assigned the role */,
  "role" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table being modified */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record being modified */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user making the change */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the change request */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments on the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification has been read */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the notification (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "target_url" TEXT /* URL for the user to follow for more information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
